creator: osa@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #4)

Thanks for the update, Alexey.

The current value is been hardcoded because the third-party module doesn't work with the recent version of ImageMagick.

I'd recommend to close this PR since we have no patches and re-open it once ImageMagick6 reaches EOL/EOS stage.
